title: P08 Investigation And Evaluation Framework - Complete
exit_criteria_met: Serious incident production-incident-AF-CAND-0263-same-window-postpatch-20260412 now has a reproducible investigation pack with scenario, trace, evaluation-suite, and benchmark-history artifacts.
Investigation traces preserve evidence references, tool calls, intermediate classifications, final classification, confidence, and follow-up actions.
Evaluation suites separate deterministic regression, MT5 replay-backed, and live incident reconciliation scenarios while pointing to a frozen benchmark-history snapshot.
Investigation artifact filenames are compact and deterministic so the workflow remains usable under Windows path-length limits.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: expanded investigation scenario, trace, and evaluation-suite models and added InvestigationPack
src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: added scenario/trace/suite writers, benchmark-history snapshotting, stable Windows-safe artifact filenames, and build_incident_investigation_pack
src/agentic_forex/utils/paths.py: added Goblin investigation, evaluation-suite, and benchmark-history report directories
src/agentic_forex/cli/app.py: added goblin-build-investigation-pack parser and command handling
tests: tests/test_goblin_investigation.py, tests/test_goblin_controls.py, tests/test_goblin_incident.py, tests/test_cli_and_boundaries.py, tests/test_goblin_program.py: 40 targeted tests, all passing
